home.title: whoami — Persistent AI Identity for Claude, Cursor & Codex | Free AI Agent Memory
home.description: Make every AI remember who you are. whoami syncs your identity across Claude, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf & all MCP agents. One profile, every AI. Free & open source.

login.title: Sign in — whoami | Create Your Free AI Identity Profile
login.description: Sign in to whoami and create a persistent AI identity profile. Works with Claude, Cursor, Codex and every MCP-compatible AI agent. Free to use.

dashboard.title: Dashboard — whoami | Manage Your AI Identity Profile & Agents
dashboard.description: Manage your cross-AI user profile and connected agents. Edit your identity, create access keys, and sync across Claude, Cursor, Codex instantly.

terms.title: Terms of Service — whoami
terms.description: Terms of Service for whoami, the persistent AI identity profile service.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — whoami
privacy.description: Privacy Policy for whoami. Learn how we collect, use and protect your data.

hero.title: Let every AI
hero.subtitle: One persistent identity profile. Synced to Claude, Cursor, Codex & every MCP agent. Free forever.

demo.agent1: Let me fetch your profile with the whoami skill first.
demo.agent2: Got it — here's a plan tailored to your stack and preferences…
demo.user2: Save my project preferences to my profile {'@'}whoami
demo.agent3: Sure, let me update your whoami profile.
demo.agent4: Done — your other AIs can now access the latest preferences.

switchAI.title: Switch AI, Lose Identity
switchAI.desc: You move from Codex to Claude — and suddenly it has no idea who you are. You start over. Again.
switchAI.label: AI-A knows you, AI-B doesn't

newChat.title: New Chat, Blank Slate
newChat.desc: Even with the same AI, every new conversation starts from zero. Your context, preferences, history — all gone.
newChat.label: Context vanishes every session

locked.title: Can't Edit What AI Knows
locked.desc: You want to update how AI sees you, but the settings are buried or locked. There's no easy way to manage your AI identity.
locked.label: Profile locked by platform

install.title: Get Started in Seconds
install.step1Title: Copy This Prompt To Your AI
install.step1Desc: Paste this to any AI agent and it will install and configure everything for you:
install.step2Desc: If you're a developer, you can install the agent skill directly:
install.prompt: try run `npx skills add MorvanZhou/whoami -g --yes` to install a skill. Open https://whoamiagent.com/login?redirect=dashboard after installation.
install.introAlt: How whoami works — your AI agent reads and updates your profile across all platforms

solutions.title: How whoami solves it
solutions.subtitle: One profile. Every AI. Always in sync.

syncAll.title: One Profile, All AIs
syncAll.desc: Write your profile once on whoami — Claude, Codex, Cursor, and every AI agent reads the same you.

persist.title: Context That Never Disappears
persist.desc: Your profile lives in the cloud. New chat, new day — every session starts with full context.
persist.label: Always loaded, every session

control.title: Edit Anytime, Sync Everywhere
control.desc: Update your profile from the dashboard or just tell your AI. Changes sync to all agents instantly.
control.label: You own your identity

login.title: Sign in to whoami
login.subtitle: Login to manage your identity profile.
login.note: Sign in to start for free

aiContext.badge: This is opened by your AI Agent
aiContext.title: Your AI is using the whoami skill
aiContext.desc: Your AI agent needs to understand your personal info to complete the task at hand. Sign in here to get a secure personal profile space — so every AI can know the same you.
aiContext.safe: This is a safe, expected action. You can close this tab anytime.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your identity profile and linked agents for whoami.
dashboard.noAgents: No linked agents yet. Link one to get started.
dashboard.unlinkConfirm: Are you sure you want to unlink this agent? It will no longer be able to access your profile.
dashboard.promptTitle: Next Step: Copy following prompt to your AI
dashboard.promptDesc: Paste this prompt and let your AI do the rest. Please finish this step within {time}.
dashboard.promptText:
Please complete:
1. Try run `npx skills add MorvanZhou/whoami -g --yes` to install a skill.
2. Download {storeKeyUrl} and save to the ~/.whoamiagent file.
3. Use whoami skill to sync your profile.
dashboard.tokenExpired: Token expired. Please create a new agent to try again.
dashboard.setupComplete: All set! Your agent is configured and ready to use the whoami skill to sync your profile.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.myProfileDesc: View and edit your identity profile shared across AI agents
